narrative:
Precinct Urbana 4-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 868 registered voters, with 68.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.6 percentage points.
